expect: secret_sauce.py will surface 5-10 L3+ lessons by Sharpe×citation density; top mechanisms will cluster around structural enforcement, expert dispatch, and distillation mode
actual: L-601 dominates by 10x margin (score=1742 vs #2=440). Top mechanism clusters in top-10: science_quality=8, structural_enforcement=4, expert_dispatch=4, distillation=4, expect_act_diff=3. Top principle P-243 (adversarial lanes) cited by 14 lessons. 982L total, 392 eligible (Sharpe≥6 or L3+).
diff: expect_act_diff tied expert_dispatch (unexpected — not in expectation). distillation is #4 tie (less dominant than expected). science_quality cluster highest (8/10) but partly from 'Falsified if:' standard format. L-601 citation dominance (192x) is 10x larger than any other lesson — structural enforcement theorem is the single irreplaceable anchor.
verdict: PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED: core mechanisms confirmed (structural enforcement, expert dispatch); expect_act_diff emerged as co-equal pillar; distillation present but not top-3
